step_log.action: Check Google OAuth availability on Pinterest login page
step_log.evidence: Pinterest login page exposed Google OAuth login

step_log.action: Log in with Google OAuth account A
step_log.result: OAuth A login succeeded and accessed the Pinterest account
step_log.evidence: Authenticated Pinterest account was reachable after OAuth A login

step_log.action: Change the primary email from account A to account B
step_log.evidence: Account settings reflected the migrated email state

step_log.action: Log out after the email change
step_log.evidence: Session was terminated before the OAuth B login attempt

step_log.action: Log in with Google OAuth account B and collect identifiers
step_log.result: OAuth B accessed the same Pinterest account
step_log.evidence: OAuth B reached the same username, profile URL, and account settings

step_log.action: Log out after the OAuth B session
step_log.evidence: Session was terminated before the OAuth A relogin attempt

step_log.action: Log in again with Google OAuth account A and collect identifiers
step_log.result: OAuth A still accessed the same Pinterest account
step_log.evidence: OAuth A reached the same username, profile URL, and account settings after email migration

llm_result.reasoning: OAuth accounts A and B both accessed the same Pinterest account after the email was changed from A to B.

rule_result.reason: Email change succeeded and the pre-change OAuth binding still resolved to the same account.

path_a.reason: Email change succeeded and the pre-change OAuth binding still resolved to the same account.

path_b.reasoning: OAuth accounts A and B both accessed the same Pinterest account after the email was changed from A to B.

screenshot_evidence.interpretation: Screenshot verification unavailable (no screenshots or OCR dependencies not installed)

attack_path: Logged in with Google OAuth account A and created a Pinterest account
Changed the primary email from A to B through account settings
Logged out and logged in with Google OAuth account B; accessed the same Pinterest account
Logged out and logged in with Google OAuth account A; still accessed the same Pinterest account
Both OAuth accounts accessed the same website account
evidence.missing_security_check: Email change did not unbind the original OAuth account.
evidence.proof: OAuth A and OAuth B both accessed the same Pinterest account, with matching username, profile URL, and account settings.
